items.title: 8-K — Termination of Material Agreement · Acquisition or Disposition · Listing / Delisting / Compliance · Modifications to Holder Rights · Changes in Control · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Amendments to Charter / Bylaws · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital sets $0.60 final distribution ahead of April 14 HRZN merger close
items.snippet: Monroe Capital announces its $13M final distribution of $0.60 per share, contingent on the April 14 asset sale and merger with Horizon Technology Finance.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital board declares final $13M distribution ahead of HRZN merger
items.snippet: Monroe Capital declares its final cash distribution funded by $13M from an asset sale to MCIP, with payment contingent on the April 14 merger close.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital, HRZN shareholders approve merger with 88% and 83% majorities
items.snippet: Shareholders of both MRCC and HRZN voted overwhelmingly to approve the NAV-for-NAV merger, with closing expected within 30 days.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital Q4 NII falls to $0.10 per share; cuts Q1 dividend to $0.09
items.snippet: Monroe Capital reports Q4 2025 NII of $0.10 per share and NAV of $7.68, and slashes the quarterly dividend to $0.09 to align with lower net investment income.

items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital calls $130M of 4.75% notes due 2026 for January 15 redemption

items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital Q3 NII drops to $0.08 per share; NAV falls to $7.99
items.snippet: Monroe Capital posts Q3 2025 NII of $0.08 per share and NAV of $7.99, continuing to support its $0.25 dividend through accumulated spillover income.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Monroe Capital agrees to merge with HRZN, MCIP to acquire assets first
items.snippet: Monroe Capital signs a definitive merger agreement to combine with HRZN in a NAV-for-NAV exchange, with former MRCC shareholders expected to own roughly 37% of the combined entity.
